> Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add supabase/agent-skills --skill supabase-postgres-best-practices --skill supabase -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/supabase`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from curated config (`docs/src/authoring/skills/supabase.mdx`) and local inventory when installed.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add supabase/agent-skills --skill supabase-postgres-best-practices --skill supabase -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Supabase platform integration: auth, realtime, storage, edge functions, and Postgres usage in agent-assisted app development. Evidence gathered from upstream SKILL.md, READMEs, and repo structure via web research.

## Install Prerequisites

Install: `npx skills add supabase/agent-skills --skill supabase -y -g -a antigravity, claude-code, codex, crush, cursor, gemini-cli, github-copilot, grok, opencode` status=install-now-after-trust-gate; selector=named

## Upstream Maintainer

[supabase/agent-skills](https://github.com/supabase/agent-skills)

## Comparable Alternatives

A general-purpose agent instruction without a scoped skill contract

&gt; Web research of upstream repo (SKILL.md/contents); evidence only, not authority. Use external-skill-auditor for live verification before install or promotion. Not an endorsement.
